(3) Learning Hexo from Scratch - How to Install Hexo

(2) Learning Hexo from Scratch - What Is Hexo?
Before we get into actually learning Hexo, let's spend a minute on what Hexo actually is and where it came from.

Why bother writing a whole series about Hexo when there are plenty of ready-made blog platforms? Honestly, Hexo is one of the easiest tools to start with — you just need to grok a few basics and you can spin up your own blog pretty fast. So no more rambling, let's start trying to build your first blog from zero.

Starting around 2020/02/02 my inbox started getting bombarded with [GitHub API] Deprecation notice for authentication via URL query parameters. The root cause is Gitalk — here's how I fixed it.
Switching Hexo NexT to Algolia Search
My posts have been getting bigger and `search.json` along with them, so I'm switching to another search approach — Algolia.
Setting Up Gitalk Comments on Hexo NexT in 10 Minutes

I switched my year-old Disqus setup to GitHub Gitalk. The main reason — Disqus comment notifications kept getting lost, sometimes I wouldn't notice replies until weeks or months later. This post is a quick guide to enabling Gitalk.
Deploying articles by hand has been getting old, so I'm switching Hexo deploy to fully automated.
Adding Word Count to Hexo NexT
